# Multimodal quality gate

## Gate checklist

```text
G1 Classification: topic obvious.
G2 First frame: visible value/problem/result.
G3 Hook: specific tension within 1–3s.
G4 Text: readable, purposeful, not cluttered.
G5 Visuals: reset attention with meaning.
G6 Proof: claim has evidence or example.
G7 Payoff: first reward arrives early.
G8 CTA: action fits value.
G9 Trust: no misleading overclaim.
G10 Series: format belongs to account strategy.
```

## Scoring

```text
0 = absent
1 = weak
2 = acceptable
3 = strong
4 = excellent
5 = exceptional
```

## Shipping rule

```text
Any gate below 3 → rewrite.
Any trust gate below 4 → rewrite.
Total below 35/50 → do not post.
Total 35–42 → test.
Total 43–50 → priority test.
```
